data.name: Furry Arena [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Furry Arena [18+] is a first-person multiplayer shooter, set in a future filled with sexy furries. In the game's primary competitive mode, players are arranged into two teams and compete on a variety of maps and game types.

The next generation of competitive gaming is here. Experience the most intense fight against real players and highly skilled artificial intelligence with a big variety of arsenal and gorgeous maps. Choose a side or be a lone wolf, the choice is yours. Currently available in 3 game modes (DM, TDM, Domination) with 3 maps.

Features
  • Competitive shooter with an erotic twist
  • Intense combat gunplay for hardcore gamers
  • Plenty of Adult Content to unlock

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
